name: todo
description: Build a todo list app with CRUD, filtering, and local storage.
prompt:
Build a todo list application with the following features:
1. Add new todos with a text input and submit button
2. Display all todos in a list
3. Each todo has a checkbox to mark it complete/incomplete
4. Each todo has a delete button
5. Filter tabs: All, Active, Completed
6. Show count of remaining active items
7. A 'Clear completed' button that removes all completed todos
8. Persist todos in localStorage so they survive page refresh
9. Style it cleanly

Make it work correctly with proper state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Can add a new todo by typing and pressing enter or clicking add
Checking a todo marks it as completed (visually distinct)
Filter tabs work: All shows all, Active shows incomplete, Completed shows done
Counter shows correct number of active items
Clear completed removes all completed todos
